stemHtml: Per SERA Regulation (EU) No 923/2012, every controlled flight must report to the appropriate ATS unit the (1) _____ of passing each designated (2) _____ reporting point (3) _____.

options.a: (1) time and level; (2) compulsory; (3) as soon as possible
options.b: (1) heading and time; (2) non-compulsory; (3) as soon as possible
options.c: (1) heading and TAS; (2) compulsory; (3) 3 minutes before reaching the point
options.d: (1) TAS and level; (2) non-compulsory; (3) 3 minutes before reaching the point
